channel.title: Daniel Zeymer von Metnitz
channel.description: Recent content on Daniel Zeymer von Metnitz

item.title: About
item.description: Hello, my name is Daniel Zeymer von Metnitz. I am a last year Medical Student, passionate about medical image analysis, statistics and global health advocacy. I am part of Ueffing Lab at the University of Tübingen where I am focusing my research on retina analysis. My research interests focus on medical images analysis, retina image analysis. I am also currently working on my Master Thesis. Enjoying sharing my skills with others, I am teaching assistant for several courses in statistics.

item.title: Advocacy
item.description: Over the last few years I have been active within different youth led organisations as well as been part of delegations to high level political meetings. I also have visited trainings, workshops and other capacity building events. Covering topics of youth engagement, global health and climate change. Following you find an overview of my activities: Summary of current activities and most important projects (08/2021-present) Clerk in the departement for education policy (12/2021 - present) Vice Head of ÖH SFU (2022) UNITE 2030 Disruptors Track, VDP 6 UNITE2030 (05/2021-06/2021) 74th World Health Assembly of the WHO, Delegate for IFMSA (09/2021) World Health Organisation (WHO), 71st Regional Committee for Europe, Delegate for the IFMSA (2021) Climate Change(s) Health (10/2020-09/2021) Vice President for External Affairs (VPE), Executive Board (2019-present) Founding member of the Alumniclub der SFU Medizin.

item.title: Code
item.description: Below you will find various projects sorted by year. Infos on my research projects. More Information about the advocacy work I am involved in. Web development German Cardiac Arrest Registry | G-CAR | 2022 G-CAR is the first national (German) registry including a long-term follow-up for adult OHCA patients with presumed underlying cardiovascular cause and long-term follow-up development and design of website, currently updating and maintaining website and server for Leipzig Heart Science gGmbH.

item.title: Contact
item.description: I am available for any inqueries on LinkedIn linkedin.com/in/dzvm. For anything else, send me an email to get in touch.

item.title: CV
item.description: Summary As a medical student I gained experience in the Medical field in different departments and I am hugely interested in all vascular topics. I also focus my research on medical image analysis and am interested in statistic, in which I also am active in teaching. I am very active in different positions and delegations advocating for youth participation. Following you find the most important positions and experiences. Check out my complete CV on LinkedIn Education (2020 – Present) Master in Medical Sciences | SFU Vienna, Austria (2018 – 2020) Bachelor in Medical Sciences, BScMed | SFU Vienna, Austria (2015 – 2018) Medicine | University of Tübingen, Germany Experience Medical (08/2022 - present) University Hospital Zurich | Departement of Vascular Surgery | Clerkship | Zurich, Switzerland (05-06/2022) Charité | Department of Emergency Medicine | Clerkship | Berlin, Germany (07/2021) Educational Surgical Clinical of Azerbaijan Medical University | Department for General Surgery | Clerkship | Baku, Azerbaijan (07/2020) Charité | Department of Cardiology | Clerkship | Berlin, Germany (07/2019) University Medical Center Hamburg-Eppendorf (UKE) | Department of Vascular Medicine, Vascular Surgery | Clerkship | Hamburg, Germany (05/2017 - 09/2018) BG Unfallklinik Tübingen | Clinic for trauma and reconstructive surgery | Student Assistant in Operating Room | Tübingen, Germany (09/2014, 03/2014, 10/2012) Diakonissen-Krankenhaus | Intensive care unit | Care Practical | Kassel, Germany (10/2010) Cedars-Sinai Medical Center | Division of Cardiology | Independent Student in Research | Los Angeles, USA Research Here you find all information about my publications, presentations and research interests.

item.title: Research
item.description: My research interests focus on medical image analysis, vascular diseases, diabetes and disease prediction. My doctoral thesis is under supervision of Prof. Marius Ueffing and J. Dietter. As I am involved within different Student organisations I am also active in Public Health Research and advocacy. Publications Blom, Iris Martine, L Campos, MEAY Ali, MMAZ Asyura, D Zeymer von Metnitz, B Limann, E Janušonytė. (2021) ‘Youth versus pandemics: the role of future generations in the pandemic treaty’, THE LANCET Global Health, Link For a detailed list of publications see my Google Scholar, ORCID or ResearchGate profile.

item.title: Sitemap
item.description: Below, a list of all the pages available on the site (in alphabetical order). If you cannot find what you are looking for, do not hesitate to contact me. For you robots out there is an XML version available for digesting as well. Pages About Contact CV Homepage Research Sitemap Code Teaching Terms and policies

item.title: Teaching
item.description: I am or have been teaching assistant for the following courses and also been active as a trainer. Teaching assistant positions I am or have been teaching assistant for the following courses: (2022 - Present) How to Read a Paper (B1e - Skills Line Evidence Based Medicine & Public Health) at the Center for Biostatistics and Epidemiology at SFU Vienna with Chair Prof. Nicole Heussen (2022 - Present) How to Report Medical Research (B1c - Skills Line Evidence Based Medicine & Public Health) at the Center for Biostatistics and Epidemiology at SFU Vienna with Chair Prof.
